Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition to to approve final distribution or status report has not been filed [TO GO OFF CALENDAR IF PETITION TO APPROVE FINAL DISTRIBUTION OR STATUS REPORT is FILED BY JULY 18, 2016]. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Assessor'S Parcel Number 6198-045)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. James Wong (Broker).

The bid was increased to $475,250.00 by Qi Ping Chen (Patrick Lin, agent) for both parcels based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt of the orders). Commission is at 5%. Bond is not required. Mr. Ferdon will specify the percentage of each parcel on the order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
